environmentCheck.reason: Windows headless environment without graphical display driver

notes.rootCause: Electron Desktop Application requires a graphical display to create BrowserWindow. The application can initialize all databases and services, but cannot render its UI in a headless environment. This is a fundamental limitation of testing GUI applications in headless environments.

alternativeVerification.conclusion: Code quality and structure are verified. User testing requires actual GUI interaction which is impossible in headless environment.

notes.unchangedFromRound2: This is the third attempt. The environment limitation remains unchanged - Electron cannot display a window without a graphical display. No new setup work was possible.
